title: I.T. Project Management

prerequisites.text: A pass in INF2003F, INF2009F and at least 45% for INF2011S.

outline: A first-semester capstone course for students majoring in Information Systems (IS) and either Computer Science, Finance or Informatics, who wish to gain both an understanding of project management issues and experience in the execution of such projects. The course combines the theoretical elements of project management (and people management) with the practical implementation of these concepts through the completion of a team project. It integrates practical and theoretical elements from other undergraduate IS courses.
dp_requirements: Submission of required project work and a sub-minimum of 45% for the year mark prior to writing the final examination. Satisfactory attendance at tutorials and lectures.
assessment: Coursework 70%; final examination 30%. Sub-minimum of 40% for the final examination.
